summary: The diff correctly implements REQ-1: the third social media icon in the Footer component has been replaced with the WhatsApp icon (SiWhatsapp from react-icons/si), the href points to https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb8BEFtFXUuarLwqVs0C, and the link opens in a new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer'. The icon uses a green hover effect and matches the same size/styling pattern as other social icons. Overall the implementation satisfies the core acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: WhatsApp hover styling uses a distinct green color (#25D366) instead of the same esports-red hover styling used by all other social icons
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-1 states the WhatsApp icon should match the same styling including hover effects and color as the other social icons in the footer. The other icons use 'hover:text-esports-red' while WhatsApp uses 'hover:text-[#25D366]', which is a deviation not requested.
